ksa_text: Skill in applying data quality standards, best practices, and compliance requirements to assess, evaluate, and improve organizational data assets.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of data handling tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-002 (Data Quality/Skill) scores 0.416 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.416) and is in_scope for the Master Data Manager role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 1. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Master Data Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, DDaT signal (0.416), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does DDaT signal (0.416) for this Data Quality KSA reflect actual Master Data Manager requirements?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of Master Data Manager job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at manager level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.416 is market-validated for Master Data Manager. Final decision: include.
